title: Trollcraft 4 Remade
description: Troll your friends or form alliences, its up to you. Remake of my old trollcraft 4 project with more mods
body:
# Attention
### beta 0.0.5 removes the FTB mods for progression, it has been replaced by another quest mod. Please make a backup of your world before updating in case of corruption

** **

### Troll your friends or form alliences, its up to you.

this modpack is inspired by the "trollcraft" series by popular youtuber ssundee. Remake of my old trollcraft 4 modpack.

** **

This modpack is in beta and more mods will be added, Please make frequent backups in case of world corruption This modpack is designed to be run on a server and played with friends so make sure to troll your friends. and send me some of your best trolls

The custom menus will be completely redone soon, until then, versions 0.0.4+ will have fancymenus disabled.

Enjoy the modpack!
-joejoe
